assets.title: Marca horizontal clara para topbar
assets.prompt: Premium horizontal wordmark for ZL Podologia, cream background, elegant foot silhouette with subtle botanical cue, terracotta and deep espresso typography, clean clinical-luxury tone, no badge circle, no extra icons, no fake emboss.
assets.notes: Substitui lockup simples do topo quando o orquestrador liberar a geracao.

usage.purpose: Dar mais presenca de marca sem badge circular.

assets.title: Marca horizontal escura para footer
assets.prompt: Dark footer wordmark for ZL Podologia, premium clinic identity, warm charcoal background, soft ivory typography, restrained botanical foot mark, elegant and legible in low-light UI, no glossy effect, no box shadow gimmicks.
assets.notes: Versao escura pensada para fundo marrom do fechamento.

usage.purpose: Reforcar assinatura de marca no fechamento.

assets.title: Selo monograma editorial
assets.prompt: Editorial monogram seal for ZL Podologia, minimal ZL initials with refined foot-inspired linework, warm neutral palette, luxury medical editorial tone, flat design, no fake gold foil, no coin effect.
assets.notes: Pode entrar em divisores, detalhes de premium e review surface.

usage.purpose: Criar um acento de marca sem virar selo falso de prova.

assets.title: Hero editorial de cuidado premium
assets.prompt: Editorial support image for a premium podology landing page, feminine yet clinical foot-care ritual, warm natural light, clean linens, subtle botanical accents, premium Fortaleza clinic mood, realistic photography, no treatment evidence, no fake faces, no salon kitsch.
assets.notes: Asset gerado seguro para apoiar o hero sem fingir atendimento real.

assets.title: Hero ambiente suave
assets.prompt: Bright premium clinic ambience for podology brand, soft off-white room, warm wood details, clean treatment setting, calm daylight, upscale but believable, no people, no certificates, no fake equipment closeup, no generic spa tropes.
assets.notes: Complementa o topo com atmosfera e profundidade de marca.

assets.title: Faixa editorial para legitimidade
assets.prompt: Wide editorial strip for a premium clinic legitimacy section, clean warm neutrals, restrained botanical forms, subtle paper texture, premium medical hospitality mood, no people, no fake clinic exterior, no text baked into image.
assets.notes: Serve como ligacao visual entre prova, legitimidade e contexto.

assets.title: Textura de papel premium
assets.prompt: Premium warm paper texture with soft mineral tonal variation, elegant and subtle, suitable for luxury clinic sections, high resolution, no pattern repetition artifacts, no visible folds, no typography.
assets.notes: Textura base para blocos com cara menos quadrada.

assets.title: Contexto editorial unha encravada
assets.prompt: Editorial support image for ingrown toenail service context, premium clinical atmosphere, precise care mood, clean neutral palette, no toe closeup procedure, no medical proof, no blood, no fake treatment result, photorealistic support asset only.

assets.title: Contexto editorial reflexologia
assets.prompt: Editorial support image for reflexology service on a premium podology landing page, serene foot-care ritual, soft towel textures, warm natural light, elevated clinic atmosphere, realistic and calm, no stock spa cliches, no fake face.
assets.notes: Ajuda a diferenciar o bloco de bem-estar no explorer.

assets.title: Contexto editorial pre-wedding

assets.notes: Asset seguro para o servico presenteavel sem virar publicidade genérica.

assets.prompt: Wide premium editorial divider for a podology landing page, warm parchment tones, soft clinical luxury atmosphere, abstract natural composition, no objects requiring proof, no text, no logos.
assets.notes: Pode reduzir a sensacao de empilhamento entre explorer e blocos seguintes.
